title: K Places Apart
hints: Use a min heap to efficiently find the minimum element in a sliding window.
Since each element is at most B places away from its sorted position, maintain a heap of size B+1.
Add the first B+1 elements to the min heap.
For each subsequent element, extract the minimum from the heap and add the next element.
After processing all elements, extract all remaining elements from the heap.
This approach achieves O(NlogB) complexity by maintaining a heap of size at most B+1.
